# vue-metamorph

> Codemod framework for Vue projects. Transform source code reliably at scale using ASTs instead of regex.

vue-metamorph parses Vue SFC, JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, SCSS, SASS, LESS, and Stylus files into ASTs. You write plugins that traverse and mutate these ASTs, and vue-metamorph detects your changes and applies them back to the source code.

## Core Concepts

- **CodemodPlugin**: A plugin that mutates ASTs to transform code. Returns the number of transforms applied.
- **ManualMigrationPlugin**: A plugin that finds nodes requiring human attention without mutating the AST.
- **transform(code, filename, plugins, opts)**: The core function. Parses code, runs plugins, returns transformed code.
- **createVueMetamorphCli(options)**: Creates a CLI runner that globs files and runs plugins against them.

## Quick Start

```bash
npx vue-metamorph my-codemod-name
```

Or install in an existing project:

```bash
npm install -D vue-metamorph
```

## Docs

- [Installation](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/installation): Install or scaffold a new project
- [Writing Codemods](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/writing-codemods): Tutorial with examples
- [Helpers and Builders](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/helpers-and-builders): API reference for AST helpers and node builders
- [SFC AST Reference](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/sfc-ast-reference): Vue template AST node type reference
- [Manual Migrations](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/manual-migrations): Finding nodes that need human attention
- [CLI](https://vue-metamorph.dev/guide/cli): CLI options and programmatic API
- [API Reference](https://vue-metamorph.dev/api/vue-metamorph): Auto-generated API docs
